narrative:
Twinsburg 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,019 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.6 percentage points.
